title: The Private Security Agencies (Regulation) Act, 2005
full_text: The Private Security Agencies (Regulation) Act, 2005 प्राइवेट सुरक्षा अभिकरण (विनियमन)अधिनियम, 2005 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 200529 Act Number: 29 Enactment Date: 2005-06-23 Act Year: 2005 Short Title: The Private Security Agencies (Regulation) Act, 2005 Hindi Title: प्राइवेट सुरक्षा अभिकरण (विनियमन)अधिनियम, 2005 Long Title: An Act to provide for the regulation of private security agencies and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of Internal Security Enforcement Date: 14-03-2006 Notification: 14th March, 2006, vide notification No. S.O. 317(E), dated 15th March, 2006, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Section 22. Offences by companies. Section 23. Indemnity. Section 24. Framing of model rules for adoption by States. Show Related Subordinates Section 25. Power of State Government to make rules.
